title: Efficient DNA Extraction from Cytogenetic Suspensions
author: Geórgia iz Monteiro Sant'ana-Arruda

steps.title: Homogenize the cytogenetic suspensions fixed in...
steps.instruction: Homogenize the cytogenetic suspensions fixed in Carnoy’s solution (methanol and acetic acid at a ratio of 3:1) .

steps.title: Transfer 150 µL to a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer 150 µL to a 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Discard the supernatant and allow the...
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant and allow the fixative to evaporate in an incubator at 37 °C for 45 minutes (or until no odor remains).

steps.title: Add 440 µL of extraction buffer (NaCl 5 M
steps.instruction: Add 440 µL of extraction buffer (NaCl 5 M: 8 mL; Tris-HCl 1 M pH 8.0: 1 mL; EDTA 0.5 M pH 8.0: 400 µL; SDS 10%: 20 mL; ultrapure water: 70.6 mL; final volume: 100 mL) and 16 µL of proteinase K (10 mg/mL).

steps.title: Vortex briefly and incubate in a...
steps.instruction: Vortex briefly and incubate in a water bath at 55 °C for 1 hour 30 min.

steps.title: Add 300 µL of NaCl 5 M
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL of NaCl 5 M. Vortex for 30 seconds.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10,000 rpm for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10,000 rpm for 10 minutes. Transfer 500 µL of the supernatant to a previously labeled 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 500 µL of ice-cold 100% isopropanol
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of ice-cold 100% isopropanol. Mix by gentle inversion.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10,000 rpm for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10,000 rpm for 10 minutes. Discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Wash the pellet with 300 µL of ice-cold 70% ethanol
steps.instruction: Wash the pellet with 300 µL of ice-cold 70% ethanol.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10,000 rpm for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10,000 rpm for 5 minutes. Discard the supernatant and allow the pellet to air-dry.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 30 µL of autoclaved Milli-Q water
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 30 µL of autoclaved Milli-Q water.
